ErrorMessages.error: Speechify client return code: The TTS client is not initialized
Speechify client return code: One of the parameters passed to the function was invalid
Speechify client return code: The port handle passed was not a valid handle
Speechify client return code: The engine on this port is no longer available
Speechify client return code: An internal error occurred in the TTS engine on the server
Speechify client return code: An error in the client/server communication occurred
Speechify client return code: WinSock initialization failed
Speechify client return code: A sockets error occurred
Speechify client return code: The client could not connect to the server
Speechify client return code: An attempt to allocate memory failed
Speechify client return code: An attempt to create a new thread failed
Speechify client return code: An attempt to create a new mutex failed
Speechify client return code: An error occurred on the server
Speechify client return code: Could not resolve the host name or IP address

Speechify client return code: A crash occurred within the client library. A crash log named ALTmon.dmp might have been generated in the Speechify SDK directory. Please send it to Speechify technical support. This is an unrecoverable error and you should close the application
Speechify client return code: This API can only be called if the TTS port is idle
Speechify client return code: A command could not be executed because the port is shutting down
Speechify client return code: SWIttsClosePort() was called when the port was already being closed
Speechify client return code: The port is already closed. You cannot invoke SWIttsClosePort() on a port that has been closed
Speechify client return code: This API cannot be executed because another API is in progress on this port on another thread
Speechify client return code: An internal error. Notify ScanSoft technical support if you see this result code.
Speechify client return code: SWIttsStop() was called when the port already in the process of stopping
Speechify client return code: SWIttsStop() was called when the port was not speaking
Speechify client return code: SWIttsAddDictionaryEntry() or SWIttsDeleteDictionaryEntry() was called with one or more invalid entries
Speechify client return code: SWIttsSetParameters() was called with at least one read-only parameter
Speechify client return code: character set is invalid or unsupported
Speechify client return code: could not parse SSML text
Speechify client return code: URI fetch failed
Speechify client return code: URI fetch failed, URI not found
Speechify client return code: URI fetch error, timeout during fetch
Speechify client return code: Dictionary operation failed, invalid dictionary type
Speechify client return code: Dictionary operation failed, dictionary is active
Speechify client return code: Dictionary operation failed, dictionary is not loaded
Speechify client return code: Dictionary load failed, dictionary is already loaded
Speechify client return code: Dictionary activate failed, another dictionary is already active with the specified priority
Speechify client return code: Dicationary activate failed, invalid priority
Speechify client return code: Dictionary load failed, dictionary parse error
Speechify client return code: API failed, no license available
Speechify client return code: Resource allocate failed, license already allocated
Speechify client return code: Resource free failed, license already freed
Speechify client return code: API failed, operation is not supported by the current version of Speechify
Speechify client return code: SWIttsInit failed, already initialized
Speechify client return code: API failed, invalid MIME media type
Speechify client: Internal logic error: unknown state
Speechify client: Internal logic error: unexpected state
Speechify client: Memory allocation failure
Speechify client: OS failure
Speechify client: Fatal TTS engine error detected
Speechify client: Transmission error detected
Speechify client: Socket function failed
Speechify client: Connection lost
Speechify client: Operation timed out
Speechify client: Dictionary operation completed with errors
Speechify client: Partial speech generation failure
Speechify client: SWIttsSpeak: server failed to execute a speak request
Speechify client: SWIttsStop: server failed to execute a stop request
Speechify client: SWIttsOpen: cannot open new port on server
Speechify client: SWIttsClose: server could not close port
Speechify client: SWIttsStop: attempting to stop when port is not speaking
Speechify client: SWIttsStop: stop requested when already stopping
Speechify client: Aborting an in-progress operation
Speechify client: Asynchronous API is used illegally
Speechify client: SWIttsInit: called more than once per process. API call ignored.
Speechify client: Thread or mutex failure
Speechify client: Socket operation failed
Speechify client: SWIttsOpenPortEx: bad parameter list
Speechify client: server cannot support this version of the client library
Speechify server: Failed to recieve a request
Speechify server: Lost the client connection
Speechify server: Socket error when waiting for connections
Speechify server: Could not bind to a socket to wait for connections
Speechify server: Client sent unexpected messages after a close port message
Speechify server: TCP/IP socket failure
Speechify server: Client connection rejected, maximum port count exceeded
Speechify server: Client connection rejected, unsupported protocol version
Speechify server: Client connection rejected, did not start with an open message
Speechify server: Client requested an unknown operation
Speechify server: Could not unbind from the socket waiting for connections
Speechify server: Server shutdown initiated
Speechify server: Server shutdown in progress, waiting for ports to shut down
Speechify server: Lost the client connection, no heartbeat or data for two timeout periods
Speechify server: Internal error, failed to register the Win32 service control message handler
Speechify server: Failed to run as a Win32 service
Speechify server: Internal error, failed to set the Win32 service status
Speechify server: Cannot mix Speechify 2.x and current server options
Speechify server: Cannot mix Speechify 2.x and current server options
Speechify server: Speechify 2.x option ignored, no longer meaningful
Speechify server: Unsupported option specified
Speechify server: SWITTSSDK environment must be set
Speechify server: SWITTSSDK environment must be non-empty
Speechify server: Server configuration initialization failed
Speechify server: Invalid server port configured
Speechify server: Invalid server port count configured
Speechify server: Server configuration shutdown failed
Speechify server: Unknown command line argument
Speechify server: Command line option requires an argument
Speechify server: Internal error, unexpected failure during port shutdown
Speechify server: Server started, waiting for connections
Speechify server: Server shutdown proceeding, assuming open ports are hung
Speechify server: Server shutdown in progress, waiting for ongoing speak request to end
Speechify server: waiting for the port to close
Speechify server: waiting for stop to complete before closing the port
Speechify server: waiting to close the port
Speechify server: waiting for the port to close
Speechify server: startup delayed, waiting for the server TCP/IP port to become available
Speechify server: Xerces initialization failed
Speechify server: Invalid configuration file path, empty string
Speechify server: Invalid configuration file path, no extension
Speechify server: Invalid configuration file path, extension not supported
